title: New Dashboard Engine shows different results with different users

posts.author: Nadi (Andreas)
posts.cookedHtml:
When activating the new Dashboard engine:

  • My colleagues get different values in certain charts then me.
  • They all get the same values while only mine is different.

When switching back to the old engine:

  • I get the same values as with the new engine.
  • My colleagues get the same values as me.

Anyone else experience this issue?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Nadi,

Would you be happy to send me a private message with your account details and if possible, some screenshots or screen-recordings of the 2 behaviours? This way I can escalate this to our technical team for investigation
